blocks.content: He sent it on a Thursday night — her time, a little after nine. She'd be done with class. Claire usually went to the library on Thursday evenings.
I need you to watch something
something I made. watch it alone if you can
it's not bad. I promise. just watch it. I'll call you after
claire just left. sending me the link?
He sat on the edge of his bed with his phone in his hand. Darius was at the library. The room was quiet. Outside, LA was going louder instead of quieter.
He counted the runtime in his head. Eleven minutes and forty seconds.
He watched the minutes go by on his phone. Ten. Eleven. Twelve.
